description: Retrieves the metadata and schema for a tool. Uses the tool name if available, otherwise falls back to intent matching to find the best match.

intent.description: The user and agent intent used to identify and retrieve the most relevant tool when no exact tool name is available.

agentIntent.description: The normalized intent produced by the agent for tool discovery, routing, or execution.

userIntent.description: The original intent as expressed by the user.

toolName.description: The unique identifier of the tool to find.

name: g4.FindTool

tool.description: The tool's metadata including name, description, input and output schemas.

title: Find G4 Tool
